notes: 0.4.0 promotes the repaired CUA scrub seam and extends it into the first intentional multi-screen and left-stick interaction release. Looking at a different hosted screen now preempts the old focus owner immediately so scrub and navigation retarget on gaze, and left-stick vertical now drives a smooth host-atom Control.Scale tween with a slow-small taper below 0.1. This keeps the player in the same simple multiple-instance model while making target switching and first-pass CUA scaling explicit behaviors instead of accidental ones.
